_doc: Deterministic generation parameters for the simplify stage. Kept in config (not code) per the tuning-in-data principle. Palette keys must exist in the client art/palette.ts.

simplify._merge_doc: Two footprints fuse into one collider when their boxes (grown by merge_margin_m) overlap — i.e. they share or nearly share a wall. max_merge_span_m caps the fused box so transitive chaining can't grow a whole block into one giant slab (which would render as a map-covering roof cone). Old-town terraces collapse from N boxes to a few, bringing 578 under the 350-collider budget (ADR-018).

camel._note: camel lanes follow real streets (clear corridors); min_lane_len_m is the shortest road span that counts as a lane. child_exclusion_m mirrors shared/tuning.json (ADR-019).

beer._note: a searching player finds beer in <=45 s (01 §3.1) -> a large find-radius; capped so a player NOT looking passes 2-3 without noticing (sparse, not blanketed).
